Ava —

Two downstream microservices timed out yesterday during our evening peak window and we had to roll traffic to a cached fallback, which degraded authorization accuracy for a short period. Our ops team attached a short CSV with the latency snapshots and a timeline.

This is impacting three of our largest merchants and we've been asked for a remediation plan + commercial offset while you investigate. Our renewals committee is watching this closely — we need a clear proposed concession (credit / free month / remediation commitments) and a timeline for the fix.

Subject: Speedgate performance follow-up — A/B plan, metrics we agreed

Thanks for the call this morning — quick recap and concrete next steps so we can get the head-to-head tests scheduled. High level: you wanted an apples-to-apples A/B vs your current HyperscaleCloud inference endpoint (HS-API) focused on tail latency and steady-state tokens/sec.

What we covered and agreed:
- Goal metrics (workload: 512-token generative prompts, batch = synthetic mix I sent): p95 <= 180ms, p99 <= 420ms, sustained tokens/sec target >= 400 on a single 80GB GPU for the representative workload.
- Test types: 1) steady-state throughput sweep (tokens/sec), 2) p95/p99 latency under small-burst traffic, 3) cold-start ta...
